title: Ai Tools
author: abcdecentralized
selftext: Hello, I've been using AI lately to code a All in One Strategy testers on Pine Script and a Python Forward Walk Optimization with a parameter search using modified PSO. I would like to have people advice on the best AI to use? I have been using Grok, Gemini studio and sometimes GPT, they work great, but i want to know what people think. I have little basic knowledge in coding only, more than the copilot, AI is the pilot, and i am only the map with the direction.

comments.author: slimlecter
comments.body: Love that AI as the pilot you’re the captain steering! Keep crushing it
